documentation.description: Dummy types that are used by clients:

simple_types.name: Tk_Anchor
simple_types.code:
type Tk_Anchor is
  (TK_ANCHOR_N,
   TK_ANCHOR_NE,
   TK_ANCHOR_E,
   TK_ANCHOR_SE,
   TK_ANCHOR_S,
   TK_ANCHOR_SW,
   TK_ANCHOR_W,
   TK_ANCHOR_NW,
   TK_ANCHOR_CENTER);

simple_types.name: Tk_ConfigTypes
simple_types.code:
type Tk_ConfigTypes is
  (TK_CONFIG_BOOLEAN,
   TK_CONFIG_INT,
   TK_CONFIG_DOUBLE,
   TK_CONFIG_STRING,
   TK_CONFIG_UID,
   TK_CONFIG_COLOR,
   TK_CONFIG_FONT,
   TK_CONFIG_BITMAP,
   …,
   TK_CONFIG_END);

simple_types.name: Tk_OptionType
simple_types.code:
type Tk_OptionType is
  (TK_OPTION_BOOLEAN,
   TK_OPTION_INT,
   TK_OPTION_DOUBLE,
   TK_OPTION_STRING,
   TK_OPTION_STRING_TABLE,
   TK_OPTION_COLOR,
   TK_OPTION_FONT,
   TK_OPTION_BITMAP,
   …,
   TK_OPTION_END);

simple_types.name: Tk_State
simple_types.code:
type Tk_State is
  (TK_STATE_NULL,
   TK_STATE_ACTIVE,
   TK_STATE_DISABLED,
   TK_STATE_NORMAL,
   TK_STATE_HIDDEN);

array_types.name: StaticTagSpace_Type
array_types.code: type StaticTagSpace_Type is array (0 .. TK_TAG_SPACE - 1) of Tk_Uid;

array_types.name: Tk_ConfigSpec_Array
array_types.code:
type Tk_ConfigSpec_Array is
  array (CNatural range <>) of aliased Tk_ConfigSpec_Rec;

record_types.name: Tk_CanvasTextInfo_Rec

fields.name: selBorder
fields.description:
Border and background for selected characters.
Read-only to items.

fields.name: selBorderWidth
fields.description:
Width of border around selection.
Read-only to items.

fields.name: selFgColorPtr
selItemPtr
fields.description:
Pointer to selected item.
NULL means selection isn't in this canvas.
Writable by items.

fields.name: selectFirst
fields.description:
Character index of first selected character.
Writable by items.

fields.name: selectLast
fields.description:
Character index of last selected character.
Writable by items.

fields.name: anchorItemPtr
fields.description:
Item corresponding to "selectAnchor": not necessarily selItemPtr.
Read-only to items.

fields.name: selectAnchor
fields.description:
Character index of fixed end of selection (i.e. "select to"
operation will use this as one end of the selection).
Writable by items.

fields.name: insertBorder
fields.description:
Used to draw vertical bar for insertion cursor.
Read-only to items.

fields.name: insertWidth
fields.description: Total width of insertion cursor. Read-only to items.

fields.name: insertBorderWidth
fields.description:
Width of 3-D border around insert cursor.
Read-only to items.

fields.name: focusItemPtr
fields.description:
Item that currently has the input focus, or NULL if no such item.
Read-only to items.

fields.name: gotFocus
fields.description:
Non-zero means that the canvas widget has the input focus.
Read-only to items.

fields.name: cursorOn
fields.description:
Non-zero means that an insertion cursor should be displayed in
focusItemPtr. Read-only to items.

record_types.name: Tk_ConfigSpec_Rec

fields.name: typ
fields.description:
Type of option, such as TK_CONFIG_COLOR; see definitions
above.

fields.name: argvName
fields.description:
Switch used to specify option in argv.  NULL means this spec
is part of a group.

fields.name: dbName
fields.description: Name for option in option database.

fields.name: dbClass
fields.description: Class for option in database.

fields.name: defValue
fields.description:
Default value for option if not specified in command line or
database.

fields.name: offset
fields.description:
Where in widget record to store value; use Tk_Offset macro
to generate values for this.

fields.name: specFlags
fields.description:
Any combination of the values defined below; other bits are
used internally by tkConfig.c.

fields.name: customPtr
fields.description:
If type is TK_CONFIG_CUSTOM then this is a pointer to info
about how to parse and print the option.  Otherwise it is
irrelevant.

record_types.name: Tk_CustomOption_Rec

fields.name: parseProc
fields.description:
Procedure to call to parse an option and store it in
converted form.

fields.name: printProc
fields.description:
Procedure to return a printable string describing an
existing option.

fields.name: data
fields.description:
Arbitrary one-word value used by option parser: passed to
parseProc and printProc.

record_types.name: Tk_Dash_Rec
Tk_FontMetrics_Rec

fields.name: ascent
fields.description:
The amount in pixels that the tallest letter sticks up above
the baseline, plus any extra blank space added by the
designer of the font.

fields.name: descent
fields.description:
The largest amount in pixels that any letter sticks below
the baseline, plus any extra blank space added by the
designer of the font.

fields.name: linespace
fields.description:
The sum of the ascent and descent.  How far apart two lines
of text in the same font should be placed so that none of
the characters in one line overlap any of the characters in
the other line.

record_types.name: Tk_GeomMgr_Rec

fields.name: name
fields.description:
Name of the geometry manager {command used to invoke it, or
name of widget class that allows embedded widgets}.

fields.name: requestProc
fields.description:
Procedure to invoke when a slave's requested geometry
changes.

fields.name: lostSlaveProc
fields.description:
Procedure to invoke when a slave is taken away from one
geometry manager by another.  NULL means geometry manager
doesn't care when slaves are lost.

record_types.name: Tk_Item_Rec

fields.name: id
fields.description:
Unique identifier for this item (also serves as first tag
for item).

fields.name: nextPtr
fields.description:
Next in display list of all items in this canvas. Later
items in list are drawn on top of earlier ones.

fields.name: staticTagSpace
fields.description: Built-in space for limited # of tags.

fields.name: tagPtr
tagSpace
fields.description: Total amount of tag space available at tagPtr.

fields.name: numTags
fields.description: Number of tag slots actually used at *tagPtr.

fields.name: typePtr
fields.description: Table of procedures that implement this type of item.

fields.name: x1
fields.description:
Bounding box for item, in integer canvas units.  Set by
item-specific code and guaranteed to contain every pixel
drawn in item.
Item area includes x1 and y1 but not x2 and y2.

fields.name: y1
fields.description:
Bounding box for item, in integer canvas units.  Set by
item-specific code and guaranteed to contain every pixel
drawn in item.
Item area includes x1 and y1 but not x2 and y2.

fields.name: x2
fields.description:
Bounding box for item, in integer canvas units.  Set by
item-specific code and guaranteed to contain every pixel
drawn in item.
Item area includes x1 and y1 but not x2 and y2.

fields.name: y2
fields.description:
Bounding box for item, in integer canvas units.  Set by
item-specific code and guaranteed to contain every pixel
drawn in item.
Item area includes x1 and y1 but not x2 and y2.

fields.name: prevPtr
fields.description:
Previous in display list of all items in this canvas.  Later
items in list are drawn just below earlier ones.

fields.name: state
fields.description: State of item.

fields.name: reserved1
fields.description: reserved for future use

fields.name: redraw_flags
fields.description:
Some flags used in the canvas
--------------------------------------------------------------------
  Starting here is additional type-specific stuff; see the
  declarations for individual types to see what is part of each type.
  The actual space below is determined by the "itemInfoSize" of the
  type's Tk_ItemType record.
--------------------------------------------------------------------

record_types.name: Tk_ItemType_Rec

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of this type of item, such as "line".

fields.name: itemSize
fields.description: Total amount of space needed for item's record.

fields.name: createProc
fields.description: Procedure to create a new item of this type.

fields.name: configSpecs
fields.description:
Pointer to array of configuration specs for this type.
Used for returning configuration info.

fields.name: configProc
fields.description: Procedure to call to change configuration options.

fields.name: coordProc
fields.description: Procedure to call to get and set the item's coordinates.

fields.name: deleteProc
fields.description: Procedure to delete existing item of this type.

fields.name: displayProc
fields.description: Procedure to display items of this type.

fields.name: alwaysRedraw
fields.description:
Non-zero means displayProc should be called even when the
item has been moved off-screen.

fields.name: pointProc
fields.description: Computes distance from item to a given point.

fields.name: areaProc
fields.description:
Computes whether item is inside, outside, or overlapping an
area.

fields.name: postscriptProc
fields.description:
Procedure to write a Postscript description for items of
this type.

fields.name: scaleProc
fields.description: Procedure to rescale items of this type.

fields.name: indexProc
fields.description: Procedure to translate items of this type.

fields.name: icursorProc
fields.description:
Procedure to set insert cursor posn to just before a given
position.

fields.name: selectionProc
fields.description:
Procedure to return selection (in STRING format) when it is
in this item.

fields.name: insertProc
fields.description: Procedure to insert something into an item.

fields.name: dCharsProc
fields.description: Procedure to delete characters from an item.

fields.name: nextPtr
fields.description: Used to link types together into a list.

fields.name: reserved1
fields.description: Reserved for future extension.

fields.name: reserved2
fields.description: Carefully compatible with

fields.name: reserved3
fields.description: Jan Nijtmans dash patch

record_types.name: Tk_OptionSpec_Rec

fields.name: typ
fields.description:
Type of option, such as TK_OPTION_COLOR; see definitions
above. Last option in table must have type TK_OPTION_END.

fields.name: optionName
fields.description: Name used to specify option in Tcl commands.

fields.name: dbName
fields.description: Name for option in option database.

fields.name: dbClass
fields.description: Class for option in database.

fields.name: defValue
fields.description:
Default value for option if not specified in command line,
the option database, or the system.

fields.name: objOffset
fields.description:
Where in record to store a Tcl_Obj * that holds the value of
this option, specified as an offset in bytes from the start
of the record. Use the Tk_Offset macro to generate values
for this.  -1 means don't store the Tcl_Obj in the record.

fields.name: internalOffset
fields.description:
Where in record to store the internal representation of the
value of this option, such as an int or XColor *.  This
field is specified as an offset in bytes from the start of
the record. Use the Tk_Offset macro to generate values for
it.  -1 means don't store the internal representation in the
record.

fields.name: flags
fields.description: Any combination of the values defined below.

fields.name: data
fields.description:
An alternate place to put option-specific data. Used for the
monochrome default value for colors, etc.

fields.name: typeMask
fields.description:
An arbitrary bit mask defined by the class manager;
typically bits correspond to certain kinds of options such
as all those that require a redisplay when they change.
Tk_SetOptions returns the bit-wise OR of the typeMasks of
all options that were changed.

record_types.name: Tk_PhotoImageBlock_Rec

fields.name: pixelPtr
fields.description: Pointer to the first pixel.

fields.name: width
fields.description: Width of block, in pixels.

fields.name: height
fields.description: Height of block, in pixels.

fields.name: pitch
fields.description:
Address difference between corresponding pixels in
successive lines.

fields.name: pixelSize
fields.description:
Address difference between successive pixels in the same
line.

fields.name: offset
fields.description:
Address differences between the red, green, blue and alpha
components of the pixel and the pixel as a whole.

record_types.name: Tk_SmoothMethod_Rec

fields.name: coordProc
fields.description: @todo make exact type

fields.name: postscriptProc
fields.description: @todo make exact type

record_types.name: Tk_TSOffset_Rec

fields.name: flags
fields.description: flags; see tk.h for possible values

fields.name: xoffset
fields.description: x offset

fields.name: yoffset
fields.description: y offset
